nodes.title: Get Expense Categories
nodes.description: GET /api/businesses/:bizId/expense-categories. Returns array of expense categories for business. Returns 200 with [{id, name, sortOrder, ...}].

nodes.title: Get Expense Budget
nodes.description: GET /api/businesses/:bizId/expense-budget with optional query month and year. Returns array of budget items. Returns 200 with [{id, name, amount, currencyId, month, year, ...}].
